message:
feat(providers): support image content in tool results for Azure and Bedrock

Both Azure and Bedrock providers previously dropped image blocks from
tool results, sending only text. This caused vision-capable models to
lose image context when tools returned screenshots or diagrams.

azure.rs: Refactors convert_message_to_azure() ToolResult handling to
separate text and image parts. Text parts are joined with newlines
into the tool message. Image parts (if any) are sent as a follow-up
user message with ImageUrl content parts, since Azure's tool role
does not support image_url content type directly. Adds clippy
allow(too_many_lines) for the conversion function.

bedrock.rs: Adds BedrockToolResultContent::Image variant to the enum
and refactors convert_tool_result_message() to iterate content blocks,
creating Text or Image entries as appropriate. Images are sent inline
using Bedrock's native image block format with base64 data and MIME
type extracted from the content block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
